name: Ripe WAtermelon Preserves
directions: Put diced melon in colander and with the hands, squeeze out as much juice as possilbe.
Let drain for 1 hour.
Put melon, sugar, salt, vinegar and lemon in large heavy kettle.
Add spices tied up in cheesecloth bag.
Cook slowly for 50-60 minutes.
Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
Place in boiling water bath for ten minutes; remove and make sure all lids seal before storing.

similar.name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing
Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad

name: Cream of Watermelon Soup
directions: Puree watermelon chunks in blender until smooth.
Add vanilla, sugar, and using an ordinary flatware soup spoon, add 3 dollops of sour cream (about 1/2 cup total), blending well.
Taste and add a little more sugar if needed- if you added too much sour cream, you may need a little more watermelon.
Chill overnight and serve garnished with a couple of mint leaves atop each bowl.

similar.name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing
Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad

name: Watermelon, Cucumber and Tomato Salad
directions: Prepare all ingredients ahead of time and store separately.
Just before serving, drain the water from the watermelon, tomato and cucumber in a colander and place them in a serving bowl.
Toss with olive oil, basil and pepper.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad
Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad

name: Watermelon Salad
directions: Cut the watermelon into large chunks.
Slice the red onion into individual pieces.
Slice the jicama into small slivers.
Mix together above ingredients and chill.
Just before serving:
sprinkle the above with the salt, drizzle the olive oil and lime juice and sprinkle with chili powder.
Adjust all to taste.
Serve immediately, this salad does not hold over well.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad
Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing

name: Watermelon Gazpacho
directions: In a blender, puree the watermelon; pour into a large mixing bowl.
Stir in remaining ingredients.
Refrigerate, covered at least 1 hour to blend flavors.
This recipe serves four but can easily be doubled.

name: Watercress, Melon and Almond Salad
directions: Whisk lime juice, sugar or honey and ginger in large bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in oil. Season the salad dressing with freshly ground pepper and salt.
Add the watercress, watermelon, and cantaloupe to dressing and toss to coat.
Transfer salad mixture to individual plates or serving bowl. Sprinkle with sliced almonds and serve.
Salad can also be chilled for 1 hour prior to serving.

similar.name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing
Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad

name: Cantaloupe Soup
directions: In blender, mix lemon juice, honey and nutmet with cantaloupe pieces.
Blend in orange juice and wine.
Chill thoroughly, about 1 hour.
Before serving, mix well.  Put 4 watermelon balls in each chilled soup plate, pour soup over and garnish with a dollop of whipped cream.

name: Watermelon and Cucumber Gazpacho
directions: Puree 4 cups watermelon in blender until smooth.
Transfer puree to large bowl.
Add remaining 1 cup diced watermelon and next 10 ingredients; stir to combine.
Cover gazpacho and refrigerate until cold, at least 1 hour and up to 4 hours.
Divide gazpacho among bowls and top with dollop of crème fraîche or sour cream.
Makes 4 servings.
Bon Appétit.
August 2005.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad
Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad

name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing
directions: Whisk lime juice, honey, mint, and oil together until honey is dissolved.
Combine the melons and onion in a large bowl.
Toss melon mixture with lime dressing to coat.
Garnish with salt and pepper to taste.

similar.name: Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad

name: Watermelon and Cucumber Salad
directions: Combine vinegar, sugar and red pepper in a small saucepan.  Bring to a boil and boil 1 minute.  Remove from heat and set aside.
Slice cucumbers and toss with salt to taste in a large bowl. Let stand at room temperature 30 minutes.
Press the cucumbers with paper towels to remove any excess liquid.
Toss the watermelon and the 1/2 teaspoon salt together in a large bowl.
Add cucumbers and vinegar mixture and toss gently to combine.
Chill or serve at room temperature.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad

name: Watermelon and Cucumber Salad
directions: Seed and chop the jalapeno pepper (using gloves so as not to get the oil on your hands).
Mix the watermelon, cucumbers, and jalapeno together.
Add vinegar and salt and mix well.
Let stand at least 15 minutes for the flavors to blend.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad

name: Chilled Cantaloupe Soup
directions: Discard seeds from cantaloupe. Scoop pulp from each cantaloupe, leaving shells 1/2 inch thick. Cut a thin slice from bottom of each shell, being careful not to cut a hole in the shell. This is so that the shells will sit flat, and can be used as soup bowls.
Combine cantaloupe pulp, sherry, sugar, and orange juice in container of an electric blender; process until smooth. Chill thoroughly. Serve in cantaloupe shells, and garnish with mint.

name: Sweet & Sour Watermelon Cucumber Salad
directions: Mix together the vinegar, water, sugar and poppy seeds in a bowl and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stir in the chopped green onion.
Place the watermelon and cucumber in a serving bowl and pour the marinade over the top.
Serve immediately or cover and refrigerate a couple of hours before serving.
Toss gently before serving.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad

name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad
directions: Put watermelon, cherry tomatoes, red onion, cucumbers, lime juice, and oil in a large bowl.
Season with pepper and salt and then toss until combined.
Cover and chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
Taste and adjust seasonings if necessary, Adding some more lime juice if it's flavor does not register.
Serve well chilled.

name: Healthy Fruit Salad
directions: You simply cut everything up into bite size pieces allowing all the juice to fall onto the fruit in the bowl,especially juice from the mango seeds.
Toss in a bowl and enjoy.

name: Fruit Salad With Citrus-Mint Dressing
directions: Combine kiwifruit, honeydew, cantaloupe, and papaya in a medium bowl.
Place sugar and remaining ingredients in a mini chopper food processor; pulse until mint is finely chopped.
Pour sugar mixture over fruit, and stir gently to coat.

similar.name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing
Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad

name: Picnic Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl; cover and chill.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad

name: Fruit Salad Boat
directions: Use a baller and ball watermelon until you reach the rind.
Place balled watermelon into a bowl.
Repeat with cantaloupe and honeydew.
Use baller to scrape unusable parts of fruit until the rinds are clean of ripe,eatable fruit and discard.
Place the balled fruit back into the watermelon rind.
Mix fruit until colors are blended.
Serve and enjoy!

similar.name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing

name: Peach-Cantaloupe Soup
directions: Cook peaches with cinnamon until soft, remove from flame.
Blend in 3/4 of the cantaloupe and puree.
Pour in orange juice and wine.  Return to flame and simmer 1/2 hour.
Refrigerate.
Before serving, dice the remaining cantaloupe very small, stir into soup.
Garnish with halved strawberries and/or sliced kiwi.

name: Fabulous Fruit Salad
directions: In a large bowl, combine all the fruit except the apple and bananas. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Just before serving, stir in bananas and apple. Combine the lemonade concentrate and pudding mix. Pour over salad and toss to coat.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad

name: Watermelon Gazpacho
directions: Take half of the seedless watermelon and put in a blender.  Pulverize with simple syrup if needed.
Fine-dice the other half of watermelon  and add to it.
Mince half of the cilantro and add to the mixture; set the other half aside for garnish.
Add the onion, peppers, jalapeno, and lime zest.
Toast the chili powders and paprika in a pan on the stove.  Add to the watermelon mixture.
Add salt, pepper, and lime juice to taste.
Garnish with cilantro sprigs and avocado slices.

similar.name: Watermelon, Cherry Tomato and Cucumber Salad

name: Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad
directions: Salad  --  In a large bowl, add the mint, red onion, lime juice, honey, cucumber and honeydew melon and toss well.  The liquid from both the melon and cucumber will be enough to combine with the simple dressing.  Season with salt and pepper to taste.  Chill at least 15 minutes.
Serve  --  Just ENJOY!  A light refreshing salad.

similar.name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing

name: Spicy Watermelon
directions: Mix cumin, coriander, chili powder, salt, and cayenne pepper together in a bowl.
Place watermelon into serving bowls; sprinkle with spice mixture. Squeeze lime juice over spiced watermelon.

name: Honeydew Melon Salad
directions: In a large bowl, toss together melon cubes, lime juice, jalapeño, salt and chile powder.
Top with cilantro, seeds, and cheese as desired.

similar.name: Watermelon Salad with Tangy Lime Dressing
Minted Cucumber and Honeydew Melon Salad
